leader_proposals.pattern_description: Trump has sustained a pattern of deadline-driven ultimatums on Iran (April 7 deadline triggering human chain defensive response) and reactive public messaging (impeachment odds rising to record highs amid war threats). However, the score of 90 already reflects near-maximum impulsivity. No meaningful increase justified.

evidence_chain.relevance: Reflects reactive decision-making triggering constitutional accountability processes

leader_proposals.counter_evidence: Score already at ceiling (90/100); no new pattern justifies increase. Actual policy outcomes show some deliberation (ceasefire negotiations ongoing), suggesting impulsivity is contained below absolute maximum.

leader_proposals.pattern_description: Sustained pattern of nuclear threat escalation: April 7 field marshal signals Pakistan escalation doctrine shift; October 18 direct nuclear retaliation threat against India with grandiose language ('shattered immunity'). These are reactive, unilateral declarations without apparent deliberative constraints. Two critical escalatory moments in 6-month window.

leader_proposals.pattern_description: Sustained pattern of systematic dismantling of accountability mechanisms: April 7 purge of 983,000 officials ahead of 2027 Taiwan deadline; secret nuclear infrastructure expansion without public disclosure (April 1); coordinated diplomatic/military escalation without institutional oversight visible in record. These represent deliberate, large-scale bypassing of internal party accountability structures.

leader_proposals.pattern_description: Sustained pattern of deliberately circumventing legal accountability: January 12 coalition advances bill to repeal fraud and breach of trust charges Netanyahu faces; December 2025 ICC rejects jurisdictional challenges but maintains arrest warrants—Netanyahu continues military operations without constraint. Coalition actively dismantling accountability mechanisms despite international legal pressure.

evidence_chain.headline: Coalition advances bill to repeal fraud and breach of trust charges Netanyahu faces

leader_proposals.counter_evidence: Threshold requires 3+ items and 2+ blocs. Only 2 items despite 2 blocs represented. Additional evidence of systemic accountability dismantling needed to reach threshold.

Cumulative pattern suggests deliberate escalation toward physical Strait control as retaliation for strikes.

Multiple constraint vectors (impeachment threat, leadership criticism, public opposition) converging simultaneously—Congress moving from passive to active constraint.

no_change_assessment: Narendra Modi shows insufficient evidence for dimension changes—single declaration on nuclear blackmail (April 7) does not constitute sustained pattern. Vladimir Putin shows one accountability item (court sentencing of ICC leadership) insufficient to meet threshold. Volodymyr Zelensky shows one corruption exposure (April 3) insufficient to establish sustained accountability pattern change. Recep Tayyip Erdogan absent from recent record. Mohammed bin Salman absent from recent record. Kim Jong-un absent from recent record.
